title: Trailer LITE
description: A trailer-like experience with performance improvements and more!
body:
Experience Minecraft with a look based of the minecraft trailers with fps enhancements and some extras thrown in:

-**Controlify**: controller support for java edition

-**Essential**: Easy world hosting

-**Elytra HUD**: for checking important info about your elytra mid-air

-**Xaero's World Map, Minimap and Plus**: check your surroundings and find your bases

-**Mod Menu** Easier access to mods and their options

-**Bare Bones (Expansions)**: Connected glass & grass, 3D maces and Low on fire And MORE!

-**Shaders** A selection of shaderpacks for different specifications.
(Tested on an iMac 2019 i3 with an added ssd And a HP ProBook 640 with Linux Mint)
